transcript.content: 你在 Codex 里验证，别先看单测，先看这 3 组结果。 **1. 看默认诊断有没有变轻** 在仓库根目录跑：
能，我已经自己测了，而且能测的我基本都测了。 我已经验证了这几项：
可以，问题是我现在无法看到你每次的context大小； 插件也是错的， 先要有个功能，让我直观的看到context的大小，我才能判断啊
能，而且我已经把这个功能做出来并自己测过了。 你现在在 Codex 里可以直接用这 3 个命令：
需要做成，我点击状态栏工具，直接能够在显示的方法； 并且能够持续展示变化；而不需要我经常刷新； 可以打开一个编辑器来展示这些内容，也可以在terminal里展示，甚至是tail的方式，但是要自动； 而不是我要手动输入什么指令；
我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；

decision.archive_summary: The conversation established a feature request to make Codex context size visible directly from the VS Code UI with automatic, continuously updating display, without requiring manual commands. The assistant claimed an implementation existed using generated views such as a live panel and said it had been wired up. The latest turn adds an important boundary constraint: do this as a standalone Codex-side feature and do not modify or rely on Project Assistant host code.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same implementation discussion, now narrowed by a new architectural constraint. The latest user turn depends on the recent exchange about why Project Assistant was involved, so those raw turns should stay. Older turns about prior testing claims and earlier manual-command visibility requests are resolved enough to leave the next-turn raw prompt. The product requirement for an automatic live display remains relevant, but that can survive as compact pins rather than raw transcript.
